Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-30 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data shows two extraordinary performers dominating the long-term momentum rankings. ADTTF ranks first with a 95.4 score, posting a stunning 9,900% return over 10 years and 273.88% over the past year, while maintaining clean momentum signals across all moving averages. ELA follows closely as the second-ranked ticker with even more aggressive recent returns—398.79% over 1 year and 131.04% over 6 months—though its 10-year return of 4,025.71% lags ADTTF's longer-term performance. Both tickers show strong momentum acceleration ratios (ELA's 3m/1m ratio of 5.32 is particularly notable) and consistently pass the 5-year to 1-year momentum hurdle, suggesting sustained uptrends rather than brief spikes. The key difference lies in consistency: ADTTF's bad_spy_score of 0.88 indicates more reliable outperformance versus the broad market, while ELA's 0.50 score suggests more volatility relative to SPY, though both remain heavily concentrated in real estate and financial sector correlations with minimal diversification benefits.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
